title: 4PCs Flat Pry Bar Set, 380mm, 250mm, 190mm, 140mm Crowbar with Heavy Duty Nail Puller, Utility Claw Bar, Wonder Bar,Mini Pry Bar for Home Remolding & Woodworking
features: KIT COMPONENTS：Your KRETLAW pry bar set features 4 flat pry bars, encompassing a 140mm mini, 190mm nail extractor, 250mm medium-sized, and a 300mm heavy-duty option; perfect for tackling a multitude of tasks with ease.
PREMIUM HIGH-CARBON STEEL: Crafted from forged high-carbon steel and adorned with 2-color metallic finish, the nail puller guarantees robustness, longevity, and resistance to rust and corrosion.

MULTI-PURPOSE MARVEL: Boasting beveled edges and triple nail slots at both extremities, this versatile tool excels in home renovations, woodworking endeavors, and a plethora of DIY activities, from nail extraction to board lifting, plywood separation, and even dirt scraping.

MINIMIZED DAMAGE & EFFORTLESS OPERATION： Equipped with a rounded rocker head and slightly curved flat-pry end, it optimizes leverage for smooth prying and lifting, minimizing surface imperfections and ensuring a scratch-free finish.
ERGONOMIC COMFORT：The precisely milled shaft edge ensures a comfortable, non-slip grip, even during extended use, ensuring a pain-free experience.
description: Product Description Multifunctional Pry Bar Product Highlight Labor-saving & Less Damage The curved rocker head is designed for maximum prying power and minimum indentation on work piece Premium Quality Made of forged steel with ultimate sturdiness and durability The two-color metal spray treatment on surface makes it rust and corrosion resistant Wide Application
